books.ar: مُسْنَدُ أَبِي بَكْرٍ الصِّدِّيقِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ
books.en: Musnad Abu Bakr as-Siddiq (ra)

books.ar: مُسْنَدِ عُمَرَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ
books.en: Musnad `Umar b. al-Khattab (ra)
The Hadeeth of Saqeefah

books.ar: مُسْنَدُ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عَفَّانَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ
books.en: Musnad Uthman ibn Affan

books.ar: وَمِنْ مُسْنَدِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ
books.en: Musnad 'Ali Ibn Abi Talib

books.ar: مُسْنَدُ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ طَلْحَةَ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى عَنْهُ
books.en: Musnad of Abu Muhammad Talhah bin 'Ubaidullah

books.ar: مُسْنَدُ الزُّبَيْرِ بْنِ الْعَوَّامِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ
books.en: The Musnad of az-Zubair bin al-'Awwam
Musnad Abu Ishaq Sa'd bin Abi Waqqas
Musnad of Sa'eed bin Zaid bin 'Amr bin Nufail
Musnad of 'Abdur-Rahman bin 'Awf az-Zuhri
Hadeeth of Abu 'Ubaidah bin al-Jarrah, whose name was 'Amir bin Abdullah
The Hadeeth of 'Abdur-Rahman bin Abi Bakr
Hadeeth of Zaid bin Kharijah
The Hadeeth of al-Harith bin Khazamah
Hadeeth of Sa'd, the freed slave of Abu Bakr
The Musnad of Ahlul-Bayt & Hadeeth of al-Hasan bin 'Ali bin Abu Talib
The hadeeth of Al-Husain bin 'Ali
Hadeeth of 'Aqeel bin Abi Talib
Hadeeth of Ja'far bin Abi Talib & It is Hadeeth of al-Hijrah (migration)
Hadeeth of 'Abdullah bin Ja'far bin Abi Talib
Musnad Bani Hashim (Hadeeth of al-'Abbas bin 'Abdul-Muttalib from the  Prophet)
Musnad of al-Fadl bin 'Abbas & narrating from the Prophet
Hadeeth of Tammam bin al-'Abbas bin 'Abdul-Muttalib from the Prophet
Hadeeth of 'Ubaidullah bin al-'Abbas & from the Prophet
Musnad of 'Abdullah bin al-'Abbas bin 'Abdul-Muttalib from the Prophet
Musnad of Abdullah bin Mas'ood

books.ar: حَدِيثُ أَبِي رِمْثَةَ عَنْ النَّبِيَّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ

collection_intro.en: Musnad Ahmad is a collection of hadith compiled by Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal (d. 241 AH/855 AD - rahimahullah). It is one of the most famous and important collections of reports of the Sunnah of the Prophet Muhammad (ﷺ). It is the largest of the main books of hadith containing approximately 28,199 hadith sectioned based on individual Companions. The translation provided here is by Nasir Khattab.
